mSDataSet.OriginalText: Welcome to the world of Pokémon!

TextInfos.Text: Welcome to the world of Pokémon!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The mysterious creatures known as
Pokémon live in all sorts of places...

TextInfos.Text: The mysterious creatures known as
Pokémon live in all sorts of places...

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Both out in nature and here in our cities—
Pokémon truly are everywhere!

TextInfos.Text: Both out in nature and here in our cities—
Pokémon truly are everywhere!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Pokémon love to compete with each
other and battle alongside people.

TextInfos.Text: Pokémon love to compete with each
other and battle alongside people.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
And this is where the best come to battle:
the Battle Arena in the city of Frontier.

TextInfos.Text: And this is where the best come to battle:
the Battle Arena in the city of Frontier.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Within this arena, Pokémon Trainers face
each other in fierce battles day and night.

TextInfos.Text: Within this arena, Pokémon Trainers face
each other in fierce battles day and night.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Caraway
Owner of the Battle Arena

TextInfos.Text: Caraway
Owner of the Battle Arena

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Kajima
Mayor of Frontier

TextInfos.Text: Kajima
Mayor of Frontier

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Trainers who battle their way to the top
in the Battle Arena are known as...

TextInfos.Text: Trainers who battle their way to the top
in the Battle Arena are known as...

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Pokémon Champions!

TextInfos.Text: Pokémon Champions!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
This title is revered throughout Frontier...
and indeed throughout the entire world!

TextInfos.Text: This title is revered throughout Frontier...
and indeed throughout the entire world!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Who will be next to claim the title
and the crown alongside it?

TextInfos.Text: Who will be next to claim the title
and the crown alongside it?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Meet your destiny at the Battle Arena!
Become the strongest Trainer of all!

TextInfos.Text: Meet your destiny at the Battle Arena!
Become the strongest Trainer of all!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Cordy’s Personal Gym

TextInfos.Text: Cordy’s Personal Gym

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Well, well!

TextInfos.Text: Well, well!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You must be {0}.

TextInfos.Text: You must be

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Name’s Cordy. I run this here Personal Gym.

TextInfos.Text: Name’s Cordy. I run this here
Personal Gym

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Fine place, wouldn’t you say? I’ve trained up a
whole lotta Pokémon here, that’s for sure.

TextInfos.Text: Fine place, wouldn’t you say? I’ve trained up a
whole lotta Pokémon here, that’s for sure.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: But I ain’t as young as I used to be.

TextInfos.Text: But I ain’t as young as I used to be.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Which is why I’ve been on the hunt for a young
go-getter who can take over the gym for me.

TextInfos.Text: Which is why I’ve been on the hunt for a young
go-getter who can take over the gym for me.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
When word reached me about you, I thought—
well, this might be just the person for the job!▽
I sure am glad you agreed to come!

TextInfos.Text: When word reached me about you, I thought—
well, this might be just the person for the job!
I sure am glad you agreed to come!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
But I’ll need to test your talent before I go
leaving my darling gym in your hands.

TextInfos.Text: But I’ll need to test your talent before I go
leaving my darling gym in your hands.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Most important, I’ll need to see whether your
Trainer chops are up to the task!

TextInfos.Text: Most important, I’ll need to see whether your
Trainer chops are up to the task!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
So what say we head to the Gym Court in the
back and get right to battling?

TextInfos.Text: So what say we head to the
Gym Court
in the
back and get right to battling?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Hey, wait! Forget somebody?

TextInfos.Text: Hey, wait! Forget somebody?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You must be the new kid that Grandpa’s been
talking about.

TextInfos.Text: You must be the new kid that Grandpa’s been
talking about.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s nice to meet you! I’m Tatora. I manage the
front desk here at the gym.

TextInfos.Text: It’s nice to meet you! I’m Tatora. I manage the
front desk here at the gym.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Hey hey heeey!

TextInfos.Text: Hey hey heeey!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Haha! Sorry for the scare.

TextInfos.Text: Haha! Sorry for the scare.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
This is Rotie—a Rotom that lives inside a headset.▼
It can tell you all sorts of useful information
during battles!

TextInfos.Text: This is Rotie—a Rotom that lives inside a headset.
It can tell you all sorts of useful information
during battles!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Seriously—Rotie’s a big help for anyone who
spends a lot of time on the court.

TextInfos.Text: Seriously—Rotie’s a big help for anyone who
spends a lot of time on the court.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Isn’t that right, Rotie?

TextInfos.Text: Isn’t that right, Rotie?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Sure izzz! I can tell you about opponents’ weak
spots, different move effects, and much more!

TextInfos.Text: Sure izzz! I can tell you about opponents’ weak
spots, different move effects, and much more!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Let’s be friendzzz,
{0}!

TextInfos.Text: Let’s be friendzzz,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Believe you me, Rotie there is a keeper. A Trainer
couldn’t ask for a better ally!

TextInfos.Text: Believe you me, Rotie there is a keeper. A Trainer
couldn’t ask for a better ally!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Now how about we get to that battle? The Gym
Court’s through here. C’mon!

TextInfos.Text: Now how about we get to that battle? The Gym
Court’s through here. C’mon!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well? I bet you’ve never seen a Gym Court in
such fine condition, have you?

TextInfos.Text: Well? I bet you’ve never seen a Gym Court in
such fine condition, have you?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The local kids like to stop by with their folks to
watch battles, so we keep the place looking nice.

TextInfos.Text: The local kids like to stop by with their folks to
watch battles, so we keep the place looking nice.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’ll lend you some of my Pokémon this time,
{0},▽
so▽
we▽
can▽
get▽
straight▽
to▽
testing▽
those▽
battle▽
skills.

TextInfos.Text: I’ll lend you some of my Pokémon this time,
so
we
can
get
straight
to
testing
those
battle
skills.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Think you can draw out my Pokémon’s potential?
Then show me what you’re made of!

TextInfos.Text: Think you can draw out my Pokémon’s potential?
Then show me what you’re made of!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
And remember!▼
No matter how old you get, the thrill of facing
a new opponent never fades!▼
That’s Pokémon battles for ya!

TextInfos.Text: And remember!
No matter how old you get, the thrill of facing
a new opponent never fades!
That’s Pokémon battles for ya!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Hah! Not half bad, kid.

TextInfos.Text: Hah! Not half bad, kid.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
In fact, top marks!▼
I’ve been battling for a good 55 years, and I can
tell you’ve got fantastic instincts.

TextInfos.Text: In fact, top marks!
I’ve been battling for a good 55 years, and I can
tell you’ve got fantastic instincts.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You pulled off a fine battle with my team!

TextInfos.Text: You pulled off a fine battle with my team!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Don’t forget about little old me! Seeing your
opponent’s weak spotzzz was handy, right?

TextInfos.Text: Don’t forget about little old me! Seeing your
opponent’s weak spotzzz was handy, right?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That battle showed me all I needed to see. Now
I know my hunch about you was correct.

TextInfos.Text: That battle showed me all I needed to see. Now
I know my hunch about you was correct.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The gym’s all yours from now on! Do with it as
you please!

TextInfos.Text: The gym’s all yours from now on! Do with it as
you please!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Wow, for real?! That was fast!

TextInfos.Text: Wow, for real?! That was fast!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, that’s Grandpa for you! Always going with
his gut while the rest of us catch up.▼
Don’t hold it against him or anything, OK,
{0}?

TextInfos.Text: Well, that’s Grandpa for you! Always going with
his gut while the rest of us catch up.
Don’t hold it against him or anything, OK,

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Hah! You got me there.

TextInfos.Text: Hah! You got me there.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Wanna know something else my gut is telling me?▼
{0}’s got what it takes...

TextInfos.Text: Wanna know something else my gut is telling me?
’s got what it takes...

mSDataSet.OriginalText: to join the ranks of our Pokémon Champions!

TextInfos.Text: to join the ranks of our
Pokémon Champions

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’ll provide any support you need, so just battle
your heart out knowing I’ve got your back!

TextInfos.Text: I’ll provide any support you need, so just battle
your heart out knowing I’ve got your back!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
What he said! Looking forward to working with
you, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: What he said! Looking forward to working with
you,

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Right! Time to recruit some Pokémon, I think!

TextInfos.Text: Right! Time to
recruit
some Pokémon, I think!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: We’re shipping out. C’mon!

TextInfos.Text: We’re shipping out. C’mon!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Hey there, Kitt! How’re things?

TextInfos.Text: Hey there, Kitt! How’re things?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Well hey, Cordy! Howdy-do?

TextInfos.Text: Well hey, Cordy! Howdy-do?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
We’ve got a whole bunch of darlin’ Pokémon
ready and rarin’ to go—just like always!

TextInfos.Text: We’ve got a whole bunch of darlin’ Pokémon
ready and rarin’ to go—just like always!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
And the Pokémon aren’t the only ones! Glad you
seem as chirpy as ever yourself.

TextInfos.Text: And the Pokémon aren’t the only ones! Glad you
seem as chirpy as ever yourself.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Allow me to introduce someone to you, Kitt.
This here’s {0}!

TextInfos.Text: Allow me to introduce someone to you, Kitt.
This here’s

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Pleasure to meetcha, {0}!
Kitt’s▽
the▽
name.▼
I’m the face of Roster Ranch, and dang proud
of it!

TextInfos.Text: Pleasure to meetcha,
Kitt’s
the
name.
I’m the face of
Roster Ranch
, and dang proud
of it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
This ranch right here is where Pokémon Breeders
raise all kinds of Pokémon with love and care.

TextInfos.Text: This ranch right here is where Pokémon Breeders
raise all kinds of Pokémon with love and care.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Then Pokémon Trainers drop on by to recruit ’em!
Ain’t this place just the best?

TextInfos.Text: Then Pokémon Trainers drop on by to recruit ’em!
Ain’t this place just the best?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Speaking of...lemme take a stab at why you’re
here.

TextInfos.Text: Speaking of...lemme take a stab at why you’re
here.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’re the new gym manager that Cordy’s been
searchin’ high and low for, ain’tcha?

TextInfos.Text: You’re the new gym manager that Cordy’s been
searchin’ high and low for, ain’tcha?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Thought so! Well, if you’ve got Cordy’s seal of
approval, you must sure be somethin’!

TextInfos.Text: Thought so! Well, if you’ve got Cordy’s seal of
approval, you must sure be somethin’!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
These darlin’ Pokémon would love to battle
beside a Trainer like you.

TextInfos.Text: These darlin’ Pokémon would love to battle
beside a Trainer like you.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: So don’t be shy about recruitin’ ’em!

TextInfos.Text: So don’t be shy about recruitin’ ’em!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Think you could tell {0}
how▽
to▽
go▽
about▽
doing▽
that, Kitt?

TextInfos.Text: Think you could tell
how
to
go
about
doing
that, Kitt?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Sure thing! Ol’ Kitt’ll explain everything, don’t
you sweat.

TextInfos.Text: Sure thing! Ol’ Kitt’ll explain everything, don’t
you sweat.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Since this’ll be your first time recruitin’ a
Pokémon from us, it’s on the house.

TextInfos.Text: Since this’ll be your first time recruitin’ a
Pokémon from us, it’s on the house.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Let’s take a look-see at who’s ready for us, then.
This way, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: Let’s take a look-see at who’s ready for us, then.
This way,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Mighty fine Pokémon you picked out there!▼
Come on back whenever you feel like recruiting
more li’l darlin’s from our ranch, you hear?

TextInfos.Text: Mighty fine Pokémon you picked out there!
Come on back whenever you feel like recruiting
more li’l darlin’s from our ranch, you hear?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Seems you’ve got the gist of how to recruit
Pokémon from Kitt.▼
With that locked down, let’s head back to the
gym, shall we?

TextInfos.Text: Seems you’ve got the gist of how to recruit
Pokémon from Kitt.
With that locked down, let’s head back to the
gym, shall we?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Take good care of that li’l darlin’ you recruited!
Don’t be a stranger, now!

TextInfos.Text: Take good care of that li’l darlin’ you recruited!
Don’t be a stranger, now!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Welcome back! Did you manage to recruit a
lovely Pokémon?

TextInfos.Text: Welcome back! Did you manage to recruit a
lovely Pokémon?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
We sure did.▼
Turns out that talented Pokémon are drawn to
talented Trainers like {0}.

TextInfos.Text: We sure did.
Turns out that talented Pokémon are drawn to
talented Trainers like

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
But that still leaves you with a grand total of one
Pokémon to your name, eh?

TextInfos.Text: But that still leaves you with a grand total of one
Pokémon to your name, eh?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ll need six Pokémon to face off against other
Trainers in battle.▼
For now, I’ll lend you the remaining five you need
from my own personal Box!

TextInfos.Text: You’ll need
six
Pokémon to face off against other
Trainers in battle.
For now, I’ll lend you the remaining five you need
from my own personal
Box

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ll need to access your own Box and add the
Pokémon there to a Battle Team before you can▽
actually use them for battling.

TextInfos.Text: You’ll need to access your own Box and add the
Pokémon there to a
Battle Team
before you can
actually use them for battling.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Speaking of—Rotie! Mind giving our new recruit
the rundown of Boxes and Battle Teams?

TextInfos.Text: Speaking of—Rotie! Mind giving our new recruit
the rundown of Boxes and Battle Teams?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Happy to! This sort of thing izzz my specialty!

TextInfos.Text: Happy to! This sort of thing izzz my specialty!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nicely done! Looks like you’ve got your Box and
a Battle Team all prepped.▼
With that, you’re finally ready to get into Ranked
Battles.

TextInfos.Text: Nicely done! Looks like you’ve got your Box and
a Battle Team all prepped.
With that, you’re finally ready to get into
Ranked
Battles

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
A good first goal for you would be to graduate
from the Beginner Tier to the Poké Ball Tier.

TextInfos.Text: A good first goal for you would be to graduate
from the
Beginner Tier
to the
Poké Ball Tier

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The Beginner Tier is pretty much what it sounds
like. Your opponents in this tier will be rookies.

TextInfos.Text: The Beginner Tier is pretty much what it sounds
like. Your opponents in this tier will be rookies.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ll do fine there—I know it. Lay it all out on
the battlefield and just have fun!

TextInfos.Text: You’ll do fine there—I know it. Lay it all out on
the battlefield and just have fun!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Ahem! Tatora!

TextInfos.Text: Ahem! Tatora!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Helloyeswhat?!

TextInfos.Text: Helloyeswhat?!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Show {0} where to go for
Ranked▽
Battles,▽
would you?

TextInfos.Text: Show
where to go for
Ranked
Battles,
would you?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You mean right now?▼
But I just started watching one of Caraway’s
old interviews!

TextInfos.Text: You mean right now?
But I just started watching one of Caraway’s
old interviews!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Here, {0}, you should
come▽
watch too.

TextInfos.Text: Here,
, you should
come
watch too.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ve heard of Caraway, right? She owns the
Battle Arena.▼
She’s also, you know, incredibly amazingly
awesome. I’ve been her biggest fan for ages!

TextInfos.Text: You’ve heard of Caraway, right? She owns the
Battle Arena.
She’s also, you know, incredibly amazingly
awesome. I’ve been her biggest fan for ages!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
C’mon now, Tatora. You can watch that video any
old time. Come back to it later.

TextInfos.Text: C’mon now, Tatora. You can watch that video any
old time. Come back to it later.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Okaaay. I’ll show you where to go,
{0}.

TextInfos.Text: Okaaay. I’ll show you where to go,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Nice going, {0}! You
breezed▽
right▽
through▽
the▽
Beginner Tier!

TextInfos.Text: Nice going,
! You
breezed
right
through
the
Beginner Tier!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It would have been a lot tougher without my
handy battle info, right? Zzt-zrt!

TextInfos.Text: It would have been a lot tougher without my
handy battle info, right? Zzt-zrt!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m so happy to see you’ve found your feet
already! I just knew you’d be great at this!

TextInfos.Text: I’m so happy to see you’ve found your feet
already! I just knew you’d be great at this!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Of course! I’d expect nothing less from the
promising Trainer I’ve taken under my wing.

TextInfos.Text: Of course! I’d expect nothing less from the
promising Trainer I’ve taken under my wing.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
But don’t forget—you still have a ways to go!
There are six tiers in total for Ranked Battles.▼
The one you’ll be dealing with next is called the
Poké Ball Tier.

TextInfos.Text: But don’t forget—you still have a ways to go!
There are
six tiers
in total for Ranked Battles.
The one you’ll be dealing with next is called the
Poké Ball Tier.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I hope someday you’ll climb through every last
tier to reach the top—the Champion Tier!▼
Coaching Trainers so they can achieve that lofty
goal is my dream!

TextInfos.Text: I hope someday you’ll climb through every last
tier to reach the top—the
Champion Tier
Coaching Trainers so they can achieve that lofty
goal is my dream!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Oh, you’re more than
capable▽
of▽
doing▽
it,▽
{0}.▽
I’m sure!

TextInfos.Text: Oh, you’re more than
capable
of
doing
it,
I’m sure!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Phew! All this burning passion sure leaves an old
fellow parched.

TextInfos.Text: Phew! All this burning passion sure leaves an old
fellow parched.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Tatora—think you could fetch us some chilled
bottles of Soda Pop from the store?

TextInfos.Text: Tatora—think you could fetch us some chilled
bottles of Soda Pop from the store?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Can do! But you’re paying me back later,
OK, Grandpa?

TextInfos.Text: Can do! But you’re paying me back later,
OK, Grandpa?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Cordy! {0}! We’ve got
guests▽
incoming!

TextInfos.Text: Cordy!
! We’ve got
guests
incoming!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, well! Caraway and Kajima!▼
It’s rare to see the both of you here together.
To what do I owe the pleasure?

TextInfos.Text: Well, well! Caraway and Kajima!
It’s rare to see the both of you here together.
To what do I owe the pleasure?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Lovely to see you, Cordy.

TextInfos.Text: Lovely to see you, Cordy.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
And you as well, Trainer! I don’t believe we’ve
met before.

TextInfos.Text: And you as well, Trainer! I don’t believe we’ve
met before.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
My name is Caraway. I’m the owner of the Battle
Arena.

TextInfos.Text: My name is Caraway. I’m the owner of the Battle
Arena.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: I’ll introduce myself as well, shall I?

TextInfos.Text: I’ll introduce myself as well, shall I?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Kajima’s the name. I’m the mayor of this fine city
of Frontier.▼
Splendid to meet you, young Trainer!

TextInfos.Text: Kajima’s the name. I’m the mayor of this fine city
of
Frontier
Splendid to meet you, young Trainer!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
So the Battle Arena’s owner is paying us a
surprise visit...with the mayor of the city?!▼
Izzz our poor old gym getting shut down
or something?

TextInfos.Text: So the Battle Arena’s owner is paying us a
surprise visit...with the mayor of the city?!
Izzz our poor old gym getting shut down
or something?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: This Rotom has some...unique ideas.

TextInfos.Text: This Rotom has some...unique ideas.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
We’re simply here as part of our tour around the
Personal Gyms.▼
I’ve only been the owner of the Battle Arena for
half a year, you know. Getting to know this city’s▽
various battle facilities is due diligence.

TextInfos.Text: We’re simply here as part of our tour around the
Personal Gyms.
I’ve only been the owner of the Battle Arena for
half a year, you know. Getting to know this city’s
various battle facilities is due diligence.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, since it’s you we’re talking about, Cordy,
I’m sure everything in this gym is shipshape.▼
You take your coaching duties just as seriously
as you take your battling!

TextInfos.Text: Well, since it’s you we’re talking about, Cordy,
I’m sure everything in this gym is shipshape.
You take your coaching duties just as seriously
as you take your battling!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Looks like you have the mayor’s seal of approval.▼
Regardless, if there is anything troubling you,
please don’t hesitate to mention it.

TextInfos.Text: Looks like you have the mayor’s seal of approval.
Regardless, if there is anything troubling you,
please don’t hesitate to mention it.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That’s kind of you to say, but I already went and
solved the one big problem on my plate.

TextInfos.Text: That’s kind of you to say, but I already went and
solved the one big problem on my plate.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Allow me to present our gym’s new manager—
our very own {0}.▼
My 55 years as a Pokémon Trainer are telling me
that this kid’s gonna be one to watch!

TextInfos.Text: Allow me to present our gym’s new manager—
our very own
My 55 years as a Pokémon Trainer are telling me
that this kid’s gonna be one to watch!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Oho! So that’s what that gleam in your eye is all
about, eh? You’ve finally found a successor!

TextInfos.Text: Oho! So that’s what that gleam in your eye is all
about, eh? You’ve finally found a successor!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ve made a good choice, Cordy. I can tell this
one has a battler’s spirit and talent to match.▽
They’ll surely do a fine job running the gym.

TextInfos.Text: You’ve made a good choice, Cordy. I can tell this
one has a battler’s spirit and talent to match.
They’ll surely do a fine job running the gym.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
{0}, was it?▼
I hope to see you win your way through Ranked
Battles—all the way up to the Champion Tier.

TextInfos.Text: , was it?
I hope to see you win your way through Ranked
Battles—all the way up to the Champion Tier.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Good luck, Champion-to-be!

TextInfos.Text: Good luck, Champion-to-be!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Gahaha!

TextInfos.Text: Gahaha!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Glad we stopped by just in time to hear the
good news!

TextInfos.Text: Glad we stopped by just in time to hear the
good news!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Yes. In fact, {0}...▼
Why don’t I give you a little something to
celebrate you becoming a gym manager?

TextInfos.Text: Yes. In fact,
Why don’t I give you a little something to
celebrate you becoming a gym manager?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You obtained the Omni Ring!

TextInfos.Text: You obtained the
Omni Ring

mSDataSet.OriginalText: That device is called an Omni Ring.

TextInfos.Text: That device is called an Omni Ring.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It can draw out the potential that lies hidden
within Pokémon!

TextInfos.Text: It can draw out the potential that lies hidden
within Pokémon!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m sure you’ll be able to make good use of it
and show us some stupendous battles.

TextInfos.Text: I’m sure you’ll be able to make good use of it
and show us some stupendous battles.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
There you have it, {0}.▼
Shake the Battle Arena to its foundations,
you hear?

TextInfos.Text: There you have it,
Shake the Battle Arena to its foundations,
you hear?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: I hope to see you there!

TextInfos.Text: I hope to see you there!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m baaack! They were out of Soda Pop, so I
got Lemonade instead. Hope that’s OK!

TextInfos.Text: I’m baaack! They were out of Soda Pop, so I
got Lemonade instead. Hope that’s OK!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
A Lemonade would really hit the spot, actually.
Thanks, Tatora.

TextInfos.Text: A Lemonade would really hit the spot, actually.
Thanks, Tatora.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m afraid you went out at the worst time, though.
Caraway stopped by for a visit, you see...

TextInfos.Text: I’m afraid you went out at the worst time, though.
Caraway stopped by for a visit, you see...

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’re JOKING! She just dropped in out of
the blue?!

TextInfos.Text: You’re JOKING! She just dropped in out of
the blue?!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I wish I’d been here to meet her... Do you think
she’ll visit again if▽
{0}▽
wins▽
a▽
bunch▽
of▽
Ranked Battles?

TextInfos.Text: I wish I’d been here to meet her... Do you think
she’ll visit again if
wins
a
bunch
of
Ranked Battles?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well, if that’s the goal, then I think a lesson on
using the Omni Ring is in order.▼
Stop on by the training room when you’re ready,
and I’ll get you started.

TextInfos.Text: Well, if that’s the goal, then I think a lesson on
using the Omni Ring is in order.
Stop on by the
training room
when you’re ready,
and I’ll get you started.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
How about a little recap of some of the topics
we’ve been talking about?

TextInfos.Text: How about a little recap of some of the topics
we’ve been talking about?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Step one! Recruit some Pokémon. Step two! Train
them up. Step three! Use them to do battle!▼
That’s pretty much the basic flow. Remember
these steps and you’ll be fine!

TextInfos.Text: Step one! Recruit some Pokémon. Step two!
Train
them up. Step three! Use them to do battle!
That’s pretty much the basic flow. Remember
these steps and you’ll be fine!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You can also use VP at the shops to get stuff like
held items and clothezzz.▼
Don’t forget to give the held items you obtain to
your Pokémon before heading into battle!

TextInfos.Text: You can also use VP at the
shops
to get stuff like
held items and clothezzz.
Don’t forget to give the held items you obtain to
your Pokémon before heading into battle!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: That about covers it for now, I think.

TextInfos.Text: That about covers it for now, I think.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Let’s all shoot for the stars as one big team!
Champion Tier, here we come!

TextInfos.Text: Let’s all shoot for the stars as one big team!
Champion Tier, here we come!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Heck yeah!

TextInfos.Text: Heck yeah!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You think so?

TextInfos.Text: You think so?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Guilty as charged!

TextInfos.Text: Guilty as charged!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: That’s right, ma’am

TextInfos.Text: That’s right, ma’am

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Well, I’ll do my best!

TextInfos.Text: Well, I’ll do my best!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Sounds too lofty for me...

TextInfos.Text: Sounds too lofty for me...

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Do you want to skip this scene?

TextInfos.Text: Do you want to skip this scene?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Great work. You’re becoming quite the battle
expert, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: Great work. You’re becoming quite the battle
expert,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That’s just the sort of gumption a gym manager
needs if they want to work their way up the ranks.

TextInfos.Text: That’s just the sort of gumption a gym manager
needs if they want to work their way up the ranks.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Mm-hmm! And it’s just what I’d expect from a
talented Trainer like you.

TextInfos.Text: Mm-hmm! And it’s just what I’d expect from a
talented Trainer like you.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Zzrt! I’m happy I get to support a quick learner
like you, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: Zzrt! I’m happy I get to support a quick learner
like you,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’re a full-fledged Trainer now, no doubt
about it!

TextInfos.Text: You’re a full-fledged Trainer now, no doubt
about it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You earned the title of Full-Fledged Trainer!

TextInfos.Text: You earned the title of
Full-Fledged Trainer

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Every journey starts with a single step. I can’t wait
to see just how far your journey will take ya!

TextInfos.Text: Every journey starts with a single step. I can’t wait
to see just how far your journey will take ya!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
For sure! I hope you keep striving to reach new
heights in Ranked Battles!

TextInfos.Text: For sure! I hope you keep striving to reach new
heights in Ranked Battles!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The higher you climb in the ranks, the more VP
you’ll be able to obtain.▼
And that’ll come in super handy when you’re
recruiting and training Pokémon.

TextInfos.Text: The higher you climb in the ranks, the more VP
you’ll be able to obtain.
And that’ll come in super handy when you’re
recruiting and training Pokémon.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m here to support you like always, so keep
having fun out there and doing your best!

TextInfos.Text: I’m here to support you like always, so keep
having fun out there and doing your best!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Lovely to see you,
{0}.▽
It’s▽
been▽
a while.

TextInfos.Text: Lovely to see you,
It’s
been
a while.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Ahhh!

TextInfos.Text: Ahhh!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Y-you’re Caraway! THE Caraway! I-I’m so thrilled
to meet you that I don’t even know what to say...

TextInfos.Text: Y-you’re Caraway! THE Caraway! I-I’m so thrilled
to meet you that I don’t even know what to say...

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Come now, Tatora, there’s no need to get
starstruck, I assure you.

TextInfos.Text: Come now, Tatora, there’s no need to get
starstruck, I assure you.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I heard about {0}’s
latest▽
accomplishment,▽
so▽
I▽
decided▽
to▽
pay▽
a▽
visit.

’s
latest
accomplishment,
so
I
decided
to
pay
a
visit.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Congratulations on your fine work in reaching
the Great Ball Tier.

TextInfos.Text: Congratulations on your fine work in reaching
the
Great Ball Tier

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
In recognition of your efforts, please allow me
to confer upon you this rather great title.

TextInfos.Text: In recognition of your efforts, please allow me
to confer upon you this rather great title.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You earned the title of Great Trainer!

TextInfos.Text: You earned the title of
Great Trainer

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
5 more Pokémon!

TextInfos.Text: Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
5 more Pokémon

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Way to go, you!

TextInfos.Text: Way to go, you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Now that you can store more Pokémon, it’ll be
easier than ever to use all sorts of different▽
strategies in your battles!

TextInfos.Text: Now that you can store more Pokémon, it’ll be
easier than ever to use all sorts of different
strategies in your battles!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
The road to the Champion Tier is long, but this
marks a significant step toward that goal.

TextInfos.Text: The road to the Champion Tier is long, but this
marks a significant step toward that goal.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: I look forward to more great work from you.

TextInfos.Text: I look forward to more great work from you.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: For now, I shall take my leave. Take care.

TextInfos.Text: For now, I shall take my leave. Take care.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Thank you so much, Caraway!▼
Come on back anytime!

TextInfos.Text: Thank you so much, Caraway!
Come on back anytime!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Wow. Caraway complimented you! Do you have
any idea how amazing that makes you?

TextInfos.Text: Wow. Caraway complimented you! Do you have
any idea how amazing that makes you?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Whatever it is you’re doing,
{0},▽
keep▽
right▽
on▽
doing it!

keep
right
on
doing it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I see you’ve been doing some wonderful work
out there, {0}.

TextInfos.Text: I see you’ve been doing some wonderful work
out there,

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Caraway! Nice timing.

TextInfos.Text: Caraway! Nice timing.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
{0}’s reached another
big▽
milestone!

TextInfos.Text: ’s reached another
big
milestone!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: So I hear.

TextInfos.Text: So I hear.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Congratulations on reaching the Ultra Ball Tier,
{0}!

TextInfos.Text: Congratulations on reaching the
Ultra Ball Tier

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Please allow me to confer upon you this
ultra-special title.

TextInfos.Text: Please allow me to confer upon you this
ultra-special title.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You earned the title of Ultra Trainer!

TextInfos.Text: You earned the title of
Ultra Trainer

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
5 more Pokémon!

TextInfos.Text: Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
5 more Pokémon

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Even Caraway’s personally acknowledging your
efforts. Guess that means you’re knocking it out▽
of the park, eh, {0}?

TextInfos.Text: Even Caraway’s personally acknowledging your
efforts. Guess that means you’re knocking it out
of the park, eh,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Though I should warn you—your climb up the
ranks will only grow more challenging from here.▼
You’ll face formidable opponents, no doubt.

TextInfos.Text: Though I should warn you—your climb up the
ranks will only grow more challenging from here.
You’ll face formidable opponents, no doubt.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Right. You’ll have to be tougher than ever before
if you want to go on raking in the victories.

TextInfos.Text: Right. You’ll have to be tougher than ever before
if you want to go on raking in the victories.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’ll need to keep working on your strategies,
too!

TextInfos.Text: You’ll need to keep working on your strategies,
too!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m sure that {0} is
more▽
than▽
up▽
to▽
the task.

is
more
than
up
to
the task.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
On that note, I shall take my leave.▼
I’ll stop by again in the happy event that you
progress to the Master Ball Tier.

TextInfos.Text: On that note, I shall take my leave.
I’ll stop by again in the happy event that you
progress to the
Master Ball Tier

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Roger! You can count on it!

TextInfos.Text: Roger! You can count on it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText: I hear you have big news to celebrate, yes?

TextInfos.Text: I hear you have big news to celebrate, yes?

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Ahhh! Caraway—you’re here again!

TextInfos.Text: Ahhh! Caraway—you’re here again!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Great timing as always, Caraway!▼
At long last, a Trainer from our gym has reached
the Master Ball Tier!

TextInfos.Text: Great timing as always, Caraway!
At long last, a Trainer from our gym has reached
the Master Ball Tier!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Well done! I must say, this gym seems to have
gained quite some fame recently.▼
The whole city is buzzing with discussion about
{0}.

TextInfos.Text: Well done! I must say, this gym seems to have
gained quite some fame recently.
The whole city is buzzing with discussion about

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I truly am grateful to you for helping to keep
Frontier alive with excitement!

TextInfos.Text: I truly am grateful to you for helping to keep
Frontier alive with excitement!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Gosh, that means a lot coming from you,
Caraway!

TextInfos.Text: Gosh, that means a lot coming from you,
Caraway!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
So our gym izzz famous now? Wow! Thankzzz for
the big PR boost, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: So our gym izzz famous now? Wow! Thankzzz for
the big PR boost,

mSDataSet.OriginalText: So. You’ve made it this far.

TextInfos.Text: So. You’ve made it this far.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Please allow me to confer upon you this
masterful title.

TextInfos.Text: Please allow me to confer upon you this
masterful title.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You earned the title of Master Trainer!

TextInfos.Text: You earned the title of
Master Trainer

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
10 more Pokémon!

TextInfos.Text: Your Box’s maximum capacity has increased to fit
10 more Pokémon

mSDataSet.OriginalText: All that’s left before you is the Champion Tier.

TextInfos.Text: All that’s left before you is the Champion Tier.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Further victories will not prove easy.▼
You will need to note strategic trends and come
up with countermeasures and clever workarounds.▼
Above all, you must be thorough in preparing for
whatever your opponents might throw at you.

TextInfos.Text: Further victories will not prove easy.
You will need to note strategic trends and come
up with countermeasures and clever workarounds.
Above all, you must be thorough in preparing for

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
But I believe you can meet this challenge,
{0}.

TextInfos.Text: But I believe you can meet this challenge,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Yeah, I’ve got faith in you too, kid.▼
We’ll reach the highest of heights together as a
team!

TextInfos.Text: Yeah, I’ve got faith in you too, kid.
We’ll reach the highest of heights together as a
team!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Just one last push till your dream comes true,
Grandpa. We’re so close now!

TextInfos.Text: Just one last push till your dream comes true,
Grandpa. We’re so close now!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m glad to see you all filled with such fervor to
reach the peak of the battling world.▼
Until we meet again, I wish you the best of luck
in your efforts.

TextInfos.Text: I’m glad to see you all filled with such fervor to
reach the peak of the battling world.
Until we meet again, I wish you the best of luck
in your efforts.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You went and did it, {0}!
You▽
made it!

TextInfos.Text: You went and did it,
You
made it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s just as we predicted from the start.▼
You can now declare with pride that you are
among the highest echelon of Trainers.

TextInfos.Text: It’s just as we predicted from the start.
You can now declare with pride that you are
among the highest echelon of Trainers.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Well, well! Thanks for stopping by, both of you!

TextInfos.Text: Well, well! Thanks for stopping by, both of you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m proud to announce that finally, after many
long years...▼
...a Trainer from our gym has reached the
Champion Tier!

TextInfos.Text: I’m proud to announce that finally, after many
long years...
...a Trainer from our gym has reached the
Champion Tier!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s literally a dream come true! I always knew
{0} could do it!

TextInfos.Text: It’s literally a dream come true! I always knew
could do it!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Hey! Don’t forget that I wazzz there offering
support the whole time! Zzt-zrt!

TextInfos.Text: Hey! Don’t forget that I wazzz there offering
support the whole time! Zzt-zrt!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’m truly happy for you,
{0}.

TextInfos.Text: I’m truly happy for you,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Please allow me to confer upon you a title
befitting this incredible accomplishment.

TextInfos.Text: Please allow me to confer upon you a title
befitting this incredible accomplishment.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: You earned the title of Champion!

TextInfos.Text: You earned the title of
Champion

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Now the real challenge begins.

TextInfos.Text: Now the real challenge begins.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Before, you were the chaser—toiling and striving
to reach this lofty tier.▼
Now, you will be chased. Challenged by those
determined to be the best Trainer of all.

TextInfos.Text: Before, you were the chaser—toiling and striving
to reach this lofty tier.
Now, you will be chased. Challenged by those
determined to be the best Trainer of all.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That’s right! And your battles will no doubt be
all the fiercer for it.▼
Only a Trainer who thrives amid such intense
competition can hope to stand above the rest!

TextInfos.Text: That’s right! And your battles will no doubt be
all the fiercer for it.
Only a Trainer who thrives amid such intense
competition can hope to stand above the rest!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Indeed. Persevering in battle as you aim ever
upward is the true essence of being a Trainer.

TextInfos.Text: Indeed. Persevering in battle as you aim ever
upward is the true essence of being a Trainer.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
That being said, don’t go overdoing it,
{0}.▼
Aiming for the top is fine, but look after yourself
first, and remember we’re here to support you!

TextInfos.Text: That being said, don’t go overdoing it,
Aiming for the top is fine, but look after yourself
first, and remember we’re here to support you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
With all of us working as a team, I just know
you’ll write your name in the Pokémon history▽
books as one of the best Trainers of all time!

TextInfos.Text: With all of us working as a team, I just know
you’ll write your name in the Pokémon history
books as one of the best Trainers of all time!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I look forward to continued brilliance from you.
Until then, take care.

TextInfos.Text: I look forward to continued brilliance from you.
Until then, take care.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Seeing you shine so bright makes me feel like
getting right back out there myself!▼
Let’s keep giving it our all, eh?

TextInfos.Text: Seeing you shine so bright makes me feel like
getting right back out there myself!
Let’s keep giving it our all, eh?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It seems a hearty congratulations is in order
once more, {0}!

TextInfos.Text: It seems a hearty congratulations is in order
once more,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It’s quite the achievement to make it to the
Master Ball Tier not just once, but twice.

TextInfos.Text: It’s quite the achievement to make it to the
Master Ball Tier not just once, but twice.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It feels like everyone in Frontier is talking about
what a star you are!

TextInfos.Text: It feels like everyone in Frontier is talking about
what a star you are!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You’re providing a shining example for other
Trainers to respect and admire. And I know▽
many out there strive to battle with your skill.

TextInfos.Text: You’re providing a shining example for other
Trainers to respect and admire. And I know
many out there strive to battle with your skill.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I’d even say that the red-hot energy in the Battle
Arena these days is in large part thanks to you!

TextInfos.Text: I’d even say that the red-hot energy in the Battle
Arena these days is in large part thanks to you!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
So keep up the good work in helping Frontier
remain the most exciting battle hub in the world!

TextInfos.Text: So keep up the good work in helping Frontier
remain the most exciting battle hub in the world!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Maybe someday soon, it’ll be me you face across
the battle court, eh?

TextInfos.Text: Maybe someday soon, it’ll be me you face across
the battle court, eh?

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
If so, let’s give the audience a show that’ll take
their breath away!

TextInfos.Text: If so, let’s give the audience a show that’ll take
their breath away!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Here’s hoping that day comes sooner rather than
later. Till then!

TextInfos.Text: Here’s hoping that day comes sooner rather than
later. Till then!

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Congratulations on your third time reaching the
Master Ball Tier, {0}.

TextInfos.Text: Congratulations on your third time reaching the
Master Ball Tier,

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
It seems you’re now able to win your battles
with admirable consistency.

TextInfos.Text: It seems you’re now able to win your battles
with admirable consistency.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Scarce few Trainers can say the same.

TextInfos.Text: Scarce few Trainers can say the same.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
You have my deepest respect for all the effort
you must have put in to make it this far.

TextInfos.Text: You have my deepest respect for all the effort
you must have put in to make it this far.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
Why, I imagine you’re now capable of defeating
almost any Trainer out there.

TextInfos.Text: Why, I imagine you’re now capable of defeating
almost any Trainer out there.

mSDataSet.OriginalText:
I look forward to encountering you on the
battlefield myself someday soon.

TextInfos.Text: I look forward to encountering you on the
battlefield myself someday soon.

mSDataSet.OriginalText: Until then, take care.

TextInfos.Text: Until then, take care.
